response.justification: The candidate has strong software development experience but lacks the specific embedded security and networking expertise required for the role. While proficient in C/C++ and some systems programming, there is no evidence of Linux kernel modification, MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, or embedded firmware development. The resume also highlights web and enterprise application development, which does not align closely with the embedded networking focus of the position.
strengths: Strong C/C++ proficiency with systems programming experience (e.g., National Instruments, NI LabWindows/CVI)
Proven ability to work in diverse technical environments (embedded, web, mobile, desktop)
Demonstrated collaboration across teams and mentorship (e.g., Altom Consulting, RIDE Capital)
concerns: No direct experience with Linux kernel modification or embedded firmware development
Lacks exposure to core security technologies required (MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, encryption technologies)
No evidence of networking switch operation, chip-vendor SDKs, or embedded device management

key_factors.factor: Proficiency in C for embedded systems
